title: angelica indica
intro: Angelica indica, also known as dong quai, is a perennial plant native to Asia and the Himalayas, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and estrogenic effects. The health benefits of Angelica indica include reducing menstrual cramps, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Angelica indica include teas, capsules, and dried roots, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
